title: SSH Brute Force
author: Detection Engineering Team
description: Detects multiple failed SSH login attempts from the same source IP within a short time window, indicating automated credential guessing activity.
false_positive_notes: Legitimate users who mistype passwords repeatedly. Automated backup or monitoring systems using incorrect credentials. Rate limit to reduce noise from misconfigured internal systems.
severity_rationale: HIGH because successful brute force leads directly to unauthorized access. Attack is automated and fast once started.
